nodes.label: /graphify add <url>
nodes.rationale: Fetches a URL (YouTube, Twitter/X, arXiv, PDF, image, or webpage) via graphify.ingest.ingest, saves it under ./raw, then auto-runs the --update pipeline to merge the new file into the existing graph.

nodes.label: --watch (folder watcher)
nodes.rationale: Background watcher (graphify.watch) that re-runs AST extraction+rebuild immediately for code-only changes, or writes a needs_update flag for docs/papers/images that require LLM semantic re-extraction; debounced so a wave of parallel agent writes doesn't trigger a rebuild per file.
